commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-core dreaming startup cron retry reconciliation to stay debug-only until the retry window is exhausted, adds regression tests for quiet retries and stale live config, and adjusts Discord voice Opus invalid-packet detection to avoid named dependency imports.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +114. Total +128 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows startup retries call the runtime reconciliation path and can emit the reported warn-level cron-unavailable log after the first retry delay; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the branch already contains the focused code and test fix and is opted into automerge, so checks and mergeability should gate the remaining work.

target.title: fix(memory-core): keep startup cron retries quiet
